nodes.context: Loosely connected criminal organizations from Ukraine involved in drug trafficking, arms smuggling, money laundering, extortion, and corruption.
Infamous Ukrainian mafia group based in Odesa, involved in smuggling, drug trafficking, and arms trafficking, with international reach.
Italian mafia-type organization from Naples, involved in cigarette smuggling and other illicit activities.
A clan of the Camorra, involved in cigarette smuggling cooperation with Ukrainian groups.
Criminal organizations from Russia, cooperating with Ukrainian groups in trafficking and other activities.
Network of illegal miners, smugglers, corrupt officials, and armed groups involved in illegal amber mining in northwestern Ukraine.
Ukrainian criminal organization involved in drug production and trafficking in Dnipropetrovsk region.
Fictional Ukrainian mafia family in the video game Stranglehold, involved in sweatshops and crack cocaine trade.
Fictional Ukrainian mob group in Batman comics and Gotham TV series, led by Luka Volk.
Fictional Kyiv-based crime syndicate in the TV series Dexter, specializing in heroin and human trafficking.

edges.context: Ukrainian mafia cooperated with Camorra in cigarette smuggling from Ukraine to Italy.
Contini clan cooperated with Ukrainian mafia in cigarette smuggling scheme.
Ukrainian and Russian mafia cooperated in trafficking drugs, weapons, and people; ties severed after 2022 invasion but continue abroad.
Odesa mafia cooperated with Russian mafia gangs in trafficking heroin, people, and counterfeit cigarettes.
